title: BGP peer session flapping — San Jose WAN edge
description: BGP peer session between sj-edge-01 and upstream ISP (upstream-isp-01) has been flapping for the past 25 minutes. 23 BGP session drops recorded since 14:05 UTC. Partial route table withdrawals are causing intermittent connectivity loss to external destinations from the San Jose site.

ground_truth.root_cause: MTU mismatch: sj-edge-01 GigE0/0 negotiated 1500, ISP expects 1480 (MPLS overhead)
